name: JoAi: Update Item

description.en: Edit the details of an existing item such as its title, content, or status.
description.de: Bearbeite die Details eines bestehenden Elements, z. B. Titel, Inhalt oder Status.
description.es: Edit the details of an existing item such as its title, content, or status.
description.fr: Edit the details of an existing item such as its title, content, or status.
description.ro: Edit the details of an existing item such as its title, content, or status.
description.it: Edit the details of an existing item such as its title, content, or status.

bot: Use this when the user wants to modify an existing item. If the user refers to an item by title, list items first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Item ID

description.en: The ID of the item to update
description.de: Die ID des zu aktualisierenden Elements
description.es: The ID of the item to update
description.fr: The ID of the item to update
description.ro: The ID of the item to update
description.it: The ID of the item to update

inputs.bot: The item hash ID. If the user refers to an item by title, list items first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Title
inputs.bot: A new title for this item, if the user wants to rename it.

inputs.name: Content

description.en: Updated content or body of the item
description.de: Aktualisierter Inhalt oder Text des Elements
description.es: Updated content or body of the item
description.fr: Updated content or body of the item
description.ro: Updated content or body of the item
description.it: Updated content or body of the item

inputs.bot: The updated body or content for this item.

inputs.name: Status
inputs.bot: The new status for this item (e.g., active, done, archived).
